text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I have a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
He's so kind, like the big brother in my book. He
took my hand even though I'm so useless...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
She's so kind, like the big sister in my book. She
took my hand even though I'm so useless...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's why I decided I want to become a blue
rose.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a wonderful person who brings
happiness wherever they go, not a useless girl
who just brings misfor—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's almost time for training...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...A little jogging beforehand can't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Rice Shower enters the starting gate, the
crowd cheering her name—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hyaaa!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hyaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
And that's another new record, Bourbon! Looks
like the star of the Classics this year is already
decided!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wow... that was really incredible. Hey, Bourbon!
Would you mind talking—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: My regimen is not yet complete. Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaa! She's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Incredible. I can't believe so many people came
to the track to see her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: If I run now, I'll probably just get in the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I begin working towards the
Twinkle Series today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to our rendezvous location, my heart
swelling with anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...But she isn't here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's still five minutes until our meetup time. As
long as she makes it to practice by then, it'll be
fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...But she never arrives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I furrow my brow. The fact that she hasn't
contacted me yet means something is definitely
wrong. Where in the world could she be?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-what should I do? Training time must be over by now... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you doing he—oh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry I wasn't able to get to practice on time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I went for a run... but there were roadworks on
the path I usually take.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So I tried a different route, but I got lost... and
then I got held up by every single traffic light...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... And now it's already this late...
choice_data_list: It's fine. I'm just glad you're okay.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-it's not fine!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Because of me, all the time you put into
preparing today's training was for nothing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So... if it's all right with you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
P-please tell me everything that we were going to
do today...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to be useless like this forever... I'll
train on my own!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-is that a no? Right, I bet that's even more
trouble...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?!
choice_data_list: You don't have to practice alone. Let's do it together!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really?! O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so, Rice Shower and I begin our journey to
take on the Twinkle Series.
